description.unified: Quickly stabs the enemy, dealing Physical DMG. On a Critical Hit, applies [Wound] 1 stack and resets the cooldown. This skill’s DMG is increased by 20% per stack of [Wound]. [(removed) immune to all damage while casting]
Removes harmful effects from self and increases ATK and Critical Hit Chance by [600->500] for [10 sec.->15sec.]

Performs a series of attacks, dealing Physical Damage 9 times, then finishes with a powerful thrust that deals Physical Damage and knocks the enemy far away. The damage of this skill is increased by 20% per [Wound] stack, and all [Wound] stacks are consumed on the final hit.
On a Critical Hit, increases ATK for 10sec. This effect stacks up to 8 times.

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but the maximum number of [Wound Stacks] is increased to 10. [(removed) If Wound Stacks is 10, deals additional damage equal to 150% of Attack Power]

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but the Critical Hit Chance increase effect is replaced with an effect that increases Critical Damage by [120%->65%], and damage dealt to bosses is increased by 30%.
Gain 45 Physical Dodge per stack. [(removed) If there are 5 or more stacks, all damage taken is reduced by 20%]

description.unified: [Shooting Star] Increases DMG by {0}%, and adds [(added) 1 Wound per attack]. [(removed) upon a Crit Hit, recovers Mana by 200]

dark.unified: When using a skill, has a 10% chance to increase your Critical Damage by [10%->7%]. This effect stacks up to 10 times.

description.unified: Each time a Critical Hit occurs, for 15 sec own Attack Speed is increased by {0} and Critical Damage is increased by {1}%. This effect stacks up to [5->8] times.
